name: German Chocolate Brownies
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------BROWNIE----------------------------------
Cream eggs and sugar. Combine with next 5 ingredients. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch square pan. Bake for 40 minutes at 350°F. Cool and Frost.
FROSTING: Cream the first 5 ingredients until thick, stirring constantly. Add coconut and chopped nuts. Cool before frosting brownies.
